title: krameria argentea
intro: Krameria argentea, also known as Silver Sage or Ratanhia, is a flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving oral health, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antioxidant effects. Krameria argentea is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be found in various oral health products, including toothpastes and mouthwashes.
